thought.text: Good, Typing handles all the AST cases. Now I need to understand what's missing. The framework already knows about `void`, `if`, `while`, `do`, `break`, `continue`, function calls, all binary/unary ops, const, arrays, function defs with parameters. The grammar is the bottleneck. Let me look at simple failing cases first:
